title: lasallea sericea
intro: Lasallea sericea, also known as the silky American ginseng or silky ginseng, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Adoxaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lasallea sericea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lasallea sericea can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
